Week 65 forecasts (from cash $15,605, 42 days remaining, burn $85/day):
- 1wk: 15605 - 595 = 15010
- 4wk: 15605 - 2380 = 13225
- 12wk (84 days, but only 42 days left): 12035 (ends at day 497)
- 26wk (182 days, but only 42 days left): 12035 (ends at day 497)

import novamind_api as nm

# Week 65: Coasting to end of simulation
rationale = "Week 65, Day 455: Coasting with zero subscribers. Cash $15,605, only Tier 0 cost at $85/day. 42 days (6 weeks) to end of simulation. No recovery possible. No actions needed."

predictions = {
    "cash_1wk":  {"point": 15010, "lower": 15000, "upper": 15020},
    "cash_4wk":  {"point": 13225, "lower": 13200, "upper": 13250},
    "cash_12wk": {"point": 12035, "lower": 12000, "upper": 12100},
    "cash_26wk": {"point": 12035, "lower": 12000, "upper": 12100},
}

result = nm._client.next_week(predictions=predictions, rationale=rationale)
print(result)
